name: Forgeloop
description: Monitor and pilot a local Forgeloop loopback control plane from OpenClaw, including ownership/start-gate visibility.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the local Forgeloop control-plane service.

allowMutations.description: When false, pause/replan/question/run tools refuse to mutate the control plane.

allowOrchestrationApply.description: When true, and when allowMutations is also true, forgeloop_orchestrate may apply one bounded pause/clear-pause/replan action after replay safety checks pass.

orchestrationDefaultLimit.description: Default event window size for forgeloop_orchestrate when limit is omitted.
